violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Kitchen employee observed on cell phone with gloves; using same gloves while preparing food.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling vent covers some light covers in kitchen area noted in need of cleaning. Lower wall area inside walkin cooler needs cleaning. Sink to be recaulked to wall.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Lower shelf in front prep area noted with contact paper needs removed. Two chest freezers need new seals; also need to be defrosted.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener not properly maintained needs routine cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling vent covers light covers and also a few ceiling tiles near hood noted in need of cleaning. Prep sink needs recaulk to wall.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Large chest freezaer needs defrosting. Shelving inside walkin cooler and lower shelves in kitchen need cleaning.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): A couple cooling units noted with thermometer not accurate.
